query: SELECT g.nome AS nomeGestante, c.destino AS email, COUNT(*) AS totalSolicitacoes, SUM(c.usado) AS codigosUsados, MAX(c.createdAt) AS ultimaSolicitacao FROM codigosAcessoGestante c LEFT JOIN gestantes g ON c.gestanteId = g.id GROUP BY c.gestanteId, g.nome, c.destino ORDER BY ultimaSolicitacao ASC LIMIT 5;
